form.formComment: Resuming after a three-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign second of 10 at Urawa December 25 over 1400m, 1.5 len behind Moko Punch with 54kg at $3.70. On debut second of 10 at Funabashi October 3 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Coal Black with 54kg at $37.90. Returns in a winnable race.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Resuming after a three-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign second of 10 at Urawa December 25 over 1400m, 1.5 len behind Moko Punch with 54kg at $3.70. On debut second of 10 at Funabashi October 3 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Coal Black with 54kg at $37.90. Returns in a winnable race.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes off a 39 day let-up. At the latest run tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 8 at this track on March 2 over 1500m, 1.0 len behind Misty Rise carrying 54kg at $2.40. The race before that raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by a nose at this track February 6 over 1400m defeating Cardamom Roll carrying 54kg at $1.40. Can take this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(1). Racing well recently. Comes off a 39 day let-up. At the latest run tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 8 at this track on March 2 over 1500m, 1.0 len behind Misty Rise carrying 54kg at $2.40. The race before that raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by a nose at this track February 6 over 1400m defeating Cardamom Roll carrying 54kg at $1.40. Can take this out.

form.formComment: At the latest run 4th of 10 at Urawa on March 19 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Paris Fountain carrying 54kg at $4.40. The run before that 5th of 13 at Urawa on February 25 over 1400m, 8 len behind Ange Luna with 54kg at $32.30. Among the winning chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). At the latest run 4th of 10 at Urawa on March 19 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Paris Fountain carrying 54kg at $4.40. The run before that 5th of 13 at Urawa on February 25 over 1400m, 8 len behind Ange Luna with 54kg at $32.30. Among the winning chances.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after seven months made ground from midfield; 2nd of 11 at Urawa on March 16 over 800m, neck behind Kleis Avanti carrying 55kg at $3.70. Previously second-up 2nd in a small field at Urawa on May 30 over 1400m, 6 len behind Dream Fighter with 54kg at $2.70. Fitter again and a winning hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Second-up. Previously second-up 2nd in a small field at Urawa on May 30 over 1400m, 6 len behind Dream Fighter with 54kg at $2.70. Fitter again and a winning hope.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 10th of 12 at this track on February 4 over 1400m, 12 len behind Engel Lied with 54kg at $44.60. Second-up 2nd of 8 at this track on March 6 over 1500m, 2 len behind Feitian with 54kg at $16.50. In the mix.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Third-up today. First-up 10th of 12 at this track on February 4 over 1400m, 12 len behind Engel Lied with 54kg at $44.60. Second-up 2nd of 8 at this track on March 6 over 1500m, 2 len behind Feitian with 54kg at $16.50. In the mix.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 37-day let-up. First-up after four months 4th of 11 at this track on March 4 over 1400m, 6 len behind Life Is with 54kg at $9.80. Previously second-up 5th of 9 at this track on August 26 over 1400m, 5 len behind Mio Thunder carrying 54kg at $7.40. Needs to lift.
